goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 <= x2 and x1 <= x2 implies x0.join(x1) <= x2 }

p.c: not forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x2 or not x1 <= x2 or x0.join(x1) <= x2 }
exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0 <= k2 and k1 <= k2 and not k0.join(k1) <= k2 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0 <= k1 and k0 <= k1 and not w0.join(k0) <= k1 } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0 <= k2 and w1 <= k2 and not w0.join(w1) <= k2 } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0 <= w2 and w1 <= w2 and not w0.join(w1) <= w2 }
w0 <= w2 and w1 <= w2
not w0.join(w1) <= w2
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x2 <= x1 or x0.join(x2) <= x1 }(w0, w2, w1)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x0.join(x1) }

p.c: not forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x0.join(x1) }
exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { not k0 <= k0.join(k1) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { not w0 <= w0.join(k0) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { not w0 <= w0.join(w1) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x0.join(x1) }(w0, w1)

function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x1.join(x0) }(w1, w0)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.join(x1.meet(x2)) = x0.join(x1).meet(x0.join(x2)) }

p.c: not forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.join(x1.meet(x2)) = x0.join(x1).meet(x0.join(x2)) }
exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0.join(k1.meet(k2)) != k0.join(k1).meet(k0.join(k2)) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0.join(k0.meet(k1)) != w0.join(k0).meet(w0.join(k1)) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0.join(w1.meet(k2)) != w0.join(w1).meet(w0.join(k2)) } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0.join(w1.meet(w2)) != w0.join(w1).meet(w0.join(w2)) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.join(x1).meet(x0.join(x2)) = x0.join(x1.meet(x2)) }(w0, w1, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.meet(x1.join(x2)) = x0.meet(x1).join(x0.meet(x2)) }

p.c: not forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.meet(x1.join(x2)) = x0.meet(x1).join(x0.meet(x2)) }
exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0.meet(k1.join(k2)) != k0.meet(k1).join(k0.meet(k2)) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0.meet(k0.join(k1)) != w0.meet(k0).join(w0.meet(k1)) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0.meet(w1.join(k2)) != w0.meet(w1).join(w0.meet(k2)) } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0.meet(w1.join(w2)) != w0.meet(w1).join(w0.meet(w2)) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.meet(x1).join(x0.meet(x2)) = x0.meet(x1.join(x2)) }(w0, w1, w2)
